mapper.sql: id, package_id, from_version_id, to_version_id, status, batch_strategy, failure_isolation, total_batches, completed_batches, failed_instances, impact_preview_id, job_id, rollback_window_expires_at, reason, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM domain_package_migration_plan WHERE package_id = #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('READY', 'RUNNING', 'PAUSED') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM domain_package_migration_plan WHERE from_version_id = #{fromVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND to_version_id = #{toVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('READY', 'RUNNING', 'PAUSED') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package_migration_plan (id, package_id, from_version_id, to_version_id, status, batch_strategy, failure_isolation, total_batches, completed_batches, failed_instances, impact_preview_id, job_id, rollback_window_expires_at, reason, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{fromVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{toVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{batchStrategyJson}, #{failureIsolation, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{totalBatches}, #{completedBatches}, #{failedInstances}, #{impactPreviewId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{rollbackWindowExpiresAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{reason}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE domain_package_migration_plan SET completed_batches = #{completedBatches}, failed_instances = #{failedInstances}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}

UPDATE domain_package_migration_plan SET status = 'READY', impact_preview_id = #{impactPreviewId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, job_id = #{jobId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status = 'DRAFT'
